ingress: A man was the victim of an attempted decapitation on an open street in north Belfast. A Sudanese man is charged with attempted murder.

titel: The 'Saint Peter' of Sävsjön became pope in Crewe
ingress: Ten members of a Shia sect have been charged in the UK with human trafficking and forced marriage, among other things. The sect was previously based near Hällefors.

titel: Denied compulsory care – found dead in the snow
ingress: A mentally ill 28-year-old was denied compulsory care and had to leave in the middle of the night. Shortly after, Lina Bryant was found dead in the snow in Tanum municipality.
